annotations.name: std::description
annotations.value: "From" address of system emails sent for e.g. password reset, etc.

annotations.name: std::description
annotations.value: Host of SMTP server to use for sending emails. If not set, "localhost" will be used.

annotations.name: std::description
annotations.value: Port of SMTP server to use for sending emails. If not set, common defaults will be used depending on security: 465 for TLS, 587 for STARTTLS, 25 otherwise.

annotations.name: std::description
annotations.value: Username to login as after connected to SMTP server.

annotations.name: std::description
annotations.value: Password for login after connected to SMTP server.

annotations.name: std::description
annotations.value: Security mode of the connection to SMTP server. By default, initiate a STARTTLS upgrade if supported by the server, or fallback to PlainText.

annotations.name: std::description
annotations.value: Determines if SMTP server certificates are validated.

annotations.name: std::description
annotations.value: Maximum time to send an email, including retry attempts.

annotations.name: std::description
annotations.value: Maximum time for each SMTP request.

annotations.name: std::description
annotations.value: The number of probes (1 by default) used by IVFFlat index. A higher value provides better recall at the cost of speed, and it can be set to the number of lists for exact nearest neighbor search (at which point the planner won’t use the index)

annotations.name: std::description
annotations.value: The size of the dynamic candidate list for search (40 by default) used by HNSW index. A higher value provides better recall at the  cost of speed.

annotations.name: std::description
annotations.value:
Specifies the minimum delay between runs of the
            deferred ext::ai::index indexer on any given branch.

annotations.name: std::description
annotations.value: The issuer URL of the provider.

annotations.name: std::description
annotations.value: A url to an image of the provider's logo.

annotations.name: std::description
annotations.value: The full origin of the sign-in page including protocol and port of the application. If using the built-in UI, this should be the origin of the EdgeDB server.

annotations.name: std::description
annotations.value: The time after which a magic link token expires.

annotations.name: std::description
annotations.value: The url to redirect to after successful sign in.

annotations.name: std::description
annotations.value: The url to redirect to after a new user signs up. If not set, 'redirect_to' will be used instead.

annotations.name: std::description
annotations.value: The flow used when requesting authentication.

annotations.name: std::description
annotations.value: The name of your application to be shown on the login screen.

annotations.name: std::deprecated
annotations.value: Use the app_name property in ext::auth::AuthConfig instead.

annotations.name: std::description
annotations.value: A url to an image of your application's logo.

annotations.name: std::deprecated
annotations.value: Use the logo_url property in ext::auth::AuthConfig instead.

annotations.name: std::description
annotations.value: A url to an image of your application's logo to be used with the dark theme.

annotations.name: std::deprecated
annotations.value: Use the dark_logo_url property in ext::auth::AuthConfig instead.

annotations.name: std::description
annotations.value: The brand color of your application as a hex string.

annotations.name: std::deprecated
annotations.value: Use the brand_color property in ext::auth::AuthConfig instead.

annotations.name: std::description
annotations.value: The url to send webhooks to.

annotations.name: std::description
annotations.value: The events to send webhooks for.

annotations.name: std::description
annotations.value: The secret key used to sign webhook requests.

annotations.name: std::description
annotations.value: A url to an image of your application's logo.

annotations.name: std::description
annotations.value: A url to an image of your application's logo to be used with the dark theme.

annotations.name: std::description
annotations.value: The brand color of your application as a hex string.

annotations.name: std::description
annotations.value: The signing key used for auth extension. Must be at least 32 characters long.

annotations.name: std::description
annotations.value: The time after which an auth token expires. A value of 0 indicates that the token should never expire.

annotations.name: std::description
annotations.value: When redirecting the user in various flows, the URL will be checked against this list to ensure they are going to a trusted domain controlled by the application. URLs are matched based on checking if the candidate redirect URL is a match or a subdirectory of any of these allowed URLs
